posts.text: Big takeaway for me is they are positioned for cookie cutter capital efficient hyper-growth I would put US government related contracts, grants and loans etc at 100%. Which alone will likely make it achieve a $20-30 bln usd market cap on Nasdaq. I expect those government relationships to be nailed down in a matter of quarters and given it’s likely a 10x’ing event as it comes to pass, those who choose to wait it out should be rewarded. When Kjirstin speaks to thousands of tonnes of orders in Asia I believe it those will come as well. This deal with Western Gas that is owned by a Japanese Conglomerate is a game changer. We should expect that relationship to be expanded to Japan imho. The relationships and joint effort will be greatly aided by the parent Nippon Sanso Matheson, Inc. Which is owned by Mitsubishi Chemical Group. As I said in an early post. The year of negotiation and due dilligence that this Japanese Conglomerate has done will pave a smooth path for similar relationships and major institutional investors to follow. “Mitsubishi Chemical Group is a Tier-1 and Tier-2 mega-supplier that heavily supplies all major Japanese automotive companies, including Toyota, Nissan, and Honda” HydroGraph is on the world stage in nanotechnology and nanomaterials now. Kjirstin’s huge grin is very telling. She knows that everything will now fall into place as they’ve meticulously planned and executed on the tedious work to get those regulatory approvals and this major Gas plant deal accomplished. Cashed up and ready to rock and roll… If the shorts hadn’t attacked the stock and broke it down I expect we would have broken out a few weeks ago and be trading at new highs already. Will be interesting to see if in the coming days and weeks we can reverse the technical chart damage done and resume the short squeeze that these criminal fraudsters deserve. They told lie after lie predicting no epa approval and claims of no production scale ability and safety concerns on the Hyperions They scared and fooled many people. There’s also a new imposter impersonator born every day on this platform… I trust Dr. Sorensen’s science and have faith that Kjirstin will continue to deliver. Good luck to those that are along for the ride… may we all prosper and see another great year of returns to follow up this past 12 months run! Cheers DYOD :)
posts.author: BambroughKevin
